title: NA LUKHU TE'N HONG NGAK DIMDEM

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Kapkawmin kuankhia in, a tuhding khaici a pua mi-in,
Lungdam in kiko na tawh buhlomte pua in,

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Leikeu na-ah guahin tui abuak bangin,
Kathaman te'n hong ngak dim dem,
Kei a ding kikoihzo khamlukhu hoihlua kisa in,
Hong tan ziah ziah khamlukhu te tang pem pam,
Endih na lukhu te'n hongngak dim dem zen veleh.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Kiphah dimdem thamante kigual diu deu,
Lungdamna khituite taak keuh keuh hongtaak keuh keuh,
Vantungmi te'n lungdamin hong muak ziah ziah,
Endih na lukhu te'n hongngak dimdemzen veleh,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ka ngah ding vangliatnate ka ngaihsut ciang,
Tua te hang amin siangtho phatning Hallelujah,
En dih nalukhu te'n hongngak dimdem zen veleh.
